calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Nov-06-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearance: William Webb for Lee Stimmel (Petitioner/Trustee).

With no objection to the petition, the Court granted the Petition for Instructions (subject to review of the order). The Court will speak to the Examiner with regard to tax expenses for the Corning property.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Sep-30-2013 Continued To Nov-04-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Sep-09-2013 Continued To Sep-30-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Aug-19-2013 Continued To Sep-09-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Mar-07-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: William Webb for Lee Stimmel.

Mr. Webb addressed the issues raised in the Examiner's notes with regard to notice. Mr. Webb clarified that the title of the notice should have been supplemental and not amended petition. The Court is allowing the 30 day notice to be waived. The Court granted the Petition for Order Confirming Trust Assets (subject to receipt of order).

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Ella Yip/ Nancy Bautista. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.
